testcase.name: 3190-concept-relationship-node-tag-selectors-generic-preferred-label-testcase
Concept Relationship Node Tag Selectors Generic Preferred Label Testcase
testcase.description: Table linkbase test case using a concept relationship node with tag selectors for period line-up, and generic preferred label

variation.name: Concept relationship node a period start preferred label on a non-abstract parent concept
variation.description: The concept relationship tree identified by the concept relationship node has a non-abstract parent with a periodStart preferred label. The table.periodStart tag should be added to the roll-up of that node.

variation.name: Concept relationship node and both sorts of preferred label
variation.description: As per v-01, except both XBRL 2.1 and generic preferred labels are in use for the tree pointed at by the relationship node, which is an error.
